hero.headline: *Fast fence builds* — no waiting around
hero.subheadline: Your fence up in days, not weeks. We show up when we say we will, rain or shine.

services_section.label: FENCE BUILDS
services_section.heading: Chain Link to Privacy — We Build It All
services_section.subheading: Every fence engineered for your yard and built to handle Alabama weather

services.title: Chain Link Fencing
services.description: Residential and commercial chain link with gates. Perfect for dog runs and property lines.

services.title: Privacy Fence Installation
services.description: Wood and vinyl privacy fencing. Keep your backyard yours.

services.title: Gate Installation
services.description: Walk-through gates and drive-through gates. Secure access that actually works.

services.title: Fence Repair
services.description: Storm damage, rotted posts, broken panels. We fix what's broken.

about.heading: Mobile's Go-To Fence Team
about.body: We're the Mobile fence crew that shows up on time and gets it done fast. Real people answering the phone — not a call center.

reviews.name: Pam M.
reviews.text: Todd is great to work with. Arrives on time, listens to what you want and gets the job done quickly! We got chain link with 2 gates and a drive thru gate. Very happy with it.

reviews.name: Kaycie Y.
reviews.text: Guy is amazing and so polite and works quick! Only few hours to get my fence completely done. Plus he's not crazy expensive either!

reviews.name: Rachel C.
reviews.text: Todd was extremely responsive and had our fence built a week after we first reached out! Couldn't believe how fast and professional he was. Very reasonably priced.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Mobile & Beyond
service_areas.subheading: Fast fence installation across the Mobile Bay area

cta.heading: Ready for Your New Fence?
cta.body: Free quotes, fair pricing, and we show up when we say we will. Most fences done in 1-2 days.
